name: NFPA 72 National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code

rules.label: Initiating Devices – Smoke Detection Spacing
rules.notes_template: Verify spot-type smoke detector spacing ≤ 30 ft on flat smooth ceilings (≤ 900 sf coverage at 0.9 spacing factor); reduce for beams, joists, sloped ceilings.
rules.citation: NFPA 72 2022 §17.7 – Smoke detector spacing limits and modifications for ceiling configurations.
rules.remediation: Document detector layout per §17 with spacing reductions for beams/joists/sloped ceilings.

rules.label: Notification Appliances – Visible (Strobe) Coverage
rules.notes_template: Verify strobe candela ratings per Table 18.5.5.4.1(a)/(b) by room dimension and mounting height; sleeping rooms require 177 cd minimum at pillow level.
rules.citation: NFPA 72 2022 §18.5 – Visible notification appliance candela ratings and locations.
rules.remediation: Build a strobe schedule from Table 18.5.5.4.1; verify each space's largest dimension drives candela selection.

rules.label: Single- and Multi-Station Alarms (Residential)
rules.notes_template: Verify single- and multiple-station smoke alarms in dwelling units per §29.5: each sleeping room, outside each separate sleeping area, on each story; interconnected; primary AC + battery backup.
rules.citation: NFPA 72 2022 §29 – Single- and multiple-station alarms and household fire alarm systems.
rules.remediation: Show §29.5-compliant smoke alarms and CO alarms, interconnected with battery backup.
